Configuration for https://turbowarp.org/
You can move, resize, and minimize this comment, but don't edit it by hand. This comment can be deleted to remove the stored settings.
{"runtimeOptions":{"maxClones":Infinity,"miscLimits":false},"width":640} // _twconfig_

STRING1: Are you sure you want to create a new game? Your progress will reset. Please type the word "

MESSAGE: Your game has been succefully reseted!
Wrong input, your game was not reseted!
